description: The Pure London homme fragrance for men from police is for the conservatice yet suave male, respecting the past while fusing it effectively with the modern to create your own style. Symbolically, the pebble shaped flacon features the Union Jack. This fragrance has top notes of lavender, incense and ginger a heart featuring warm notes of cardamom, amber and patchouli and the base has cedar, vanilla and musk tones.Quantity: 75 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
